description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On July 2, 2025 at 6:03 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on 4th Street near Market Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southeastbound on 4th Street in the second to the right lane when it slowed to yield to a taxicab in the 
rightmost dedicated transit lane attempting to merge into the Waymo AV’s lane of travel. A passenger car traveling behind the Waymo AV 
approached the Waymo AV from behind, and the front driver side of the passenger car made contact with the rear passenger side of the 
Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
